2606.17950.title: Plug-and-Adapt: Multimodal Coreference Resolution at First Sight with a Pretrained Alignment Model
2606.17950.paper_summary: Visual information helps resolve ambiguity in coreference resolution, leading to notable performance gains. However, existing Multi-modal Coreference Resolution (MCR) methods require training with (partially) annotated data from the target dataset before they can be applied, preventing their direct usability and raising concerns about generalization. While Vision-Language Large Models (VLLMs) with billions of parameters offer promising zero-shot capabilities, they remain largely inaccessible. Their massive size limits deployability, and many are only accessible through paid APIs. In this paper, we propose a plug-and-adapt method that strategically adapts a carefully pre-trained \emph{alignment model} for immediate use in MCR tasks, designed to eliminate the need for training on scarce benchmark datasets or relying on resource-intensive VLLMs. Specifically, we first pre-train a fine-grained alignment model between textual and visual contextual information using vision-language alignment datasets. We then repurpose the alignment model to MCR through similarity aggregation by fusing visual and categorical cues with evidence theory, thereby enhancing effectiveness. Experiments on the Coreference Image Narratives (CIN) benchmark dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, achieving a 5.31\% and 2.12\% improvement in CoNLL F1 over SOTA dedicated methods and popular VLLMs, respectively. We further evaluate our method on a masked CIN dataset for robustness testing and on a specially constructed VCR-MCR dataset for generalization assessment, with results confirming both capabilities.
2606.17950.paper_summary_zh: 視覺信息有助於解決核心參照解析中的模糊性，從而帶來顯著的性能提升。<lb/>然而，現有的多模態核心參照解析（MCR）方法在應用之前需要使用目標數據集中的（部分）標註數據進行訓練，這限制了它們的直接可用性並引發了對泛化能力的擔憂。<lb/>儘管擁有數十億參數的視覺-語言大型模型（VLLMs）提供了有希望的零樣本能力，但它們仍然在很大程度上無法訪問。<lb/>它們的龐大規模限制了部署的可能性，許多僅能通過付費API訪問。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了一種插拔式適應方法，該方法戰略性地調整了一個精心預訓練的\emph{對齊模型}，以便立即用於MCR任務，旨在消除對稀缺基準數據集進行訓練或依賴資源密集型VLLMs的需求。<lb/>具體而言，我們首先使用視覺-語言對齊數據集預訓練一個文本和視覺上下文信息之間的細粒度對齊模型。<lb/>然後，我們通過融合視覺和類別線索與證據理論的相似性聚合，將對齊模型重新用於MCR，從而提高效果。<lb/>在核心參照圖像敘事（CIN）基準數據集上的實驗證明了我們方法的有效性，分別在CoNLL F1上實現了比SOTA專用方法和流行的VLLMs提高5.31\%和2.12\%。<lb/>我們進一步在一個被遮罩的CIN數據集上進行穩健性測試，並在一個專門構建的VCR-MCR數據集上進行泛化評估，結果確認了這兩種能力。
2606.17950.author: Jinghan Wu et.al.
2606.17950.authors: Jinghan Wu, Jing Li, Ivor W. Tsang, Xuetao Zhang
